name: karakeep-homedash
tagline: A personal dashboard for monitoring and controlling home or server resources
description: Karakeep Homedash is a personal dashboard for managing smart home or server resources. It displays widgets, stats and quick links, letting users build a customized control panel for self hosted services.

features.title: Home Dashboard
features.description: Display a personal dashboard with links and widgets

features.title: Service Shortcuts
features.description: Provide quick access to self-hosted services

features.title: Custom Layout
features.description: Arrange dashboard sections to fit personal preferences

features.title: Self-Hosted Frontend
features.description: Host the dashboard on your own servers
